
**Explanation:**

##### TOP LEVEL

* **`id`**: Unique widget identifier
* **`elType`**: Always `"widget"`
* **`widgetType`**: Must be `"testimonial-carousel"`
* **`elements`**: Always empty array

##### SLIDES (CRITICAL - REPEATER)

* **`slides`**
    * Array of testimonial items. Each includes: `_id`, `testimonial_content` (Main text), `name` (Person name), `job` (Job title/company), `image` (Profile image object: `url`, `id`, `alt`).
    * *IMPORTANT: `slides` is REQUIRED. At least one item must exist.*

##### SLIDER SETTINGS & NAVIGATION

* **`slides_to_show`**: Number of visible testimonials (STRING value)
* **`slides_to_scroll`**: Number of items per slide
* **`navigation`**: UI controls (`none`, `arrows`, `dots`, `both`)

##### AUTOPLAY, LOOP, SPEED & SPACING

* **`autoplay`**: `"yes"` enables auto sliding
* **`autoplay_speed`**: Delay between slides (ms)
* **`pause_on_hover`**: `"yes"` pauses autoplay
* **`infinite`**: `"yes"` enables infinite loop
* **`speed`**: Transition speed (ms)
* **`space_between`**: Space between slides

##### ALIGNMENT & COLORS

* **`align`**: Alignment of carousel container
* **`content_color`** / **`name_color`** / **`job_color`**: Text colors

**IMPORTANT NOTES:**
1. `slides[]` is REQUIRED. Each item MUST include `testimonial_content` and `name`.
2. `slides_to_show` is STRING (not number).
3. Works like testimonial + image carousel combined. Elementor uses Swiper.js internally.

assignments.name: image-box
assignments.value:
#### Image Box (Widget)

A self-contained block combining an image, title, and description.

* `elType`: `"widget"`
* `widgetType`: `"image-box"`
* `elements`: Must be `[]`.
* `settings`:
    * `image`: An **Image Object**.
    * `title_text`: The string for the title.
    * `description_text`: The string for the body text.
    * Global settings for alignment, image size, and typography/colors.

**Example (Image Box):**

```json
{

  "widgetType": "image-box",
  "settings": {
    "image": {

      "id": "",
      "alt": "Sample Image"
    },

    "image_size": "large",

    "title_text": "Image Box Title",

    "description_text": "This is the description for the image box.",

    "link": {
      "url": "#",
      "is_external": "",
      "nofollow": ""
    },

    "link_to": "custom",

    "image_position": "top",

    "align": "center",

    "title_color": "#000000",
    "description_color": "#777777",

    "title_typography_typography": "custom",
    "title_typography_font_size": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 20
    },
    "title_typography_font_weight": "600",

    "description_typography_typography": "custom",
    "description_typography_font_size": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 14
    },

    "space_between": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 10
    },

    "image_border_radius": {
      "unit": "px",
      "top": 10,
      "right": 10,
      "bottom": 10,
      "left": 10,
      "isLinked": true
    },

    "hover_animation": "grow",

    "margin": {
      "unit": "px",
      "top": 0,
      "right": 0,
      "bottom": 20,
      "left": 0,
      "isLinked": false
    },

    "_animation": "",
    "_animation_delay": 0,

    "css_classes": "",
    "custom_css": ""
  },
  "elements": []
}
```

**Explanation:**

##### TOP LEVEL

* **`id`**: Unique widget identifier
* **`elType`**: Always `"widget"`
* **`widgetType`**: Must be `"image-box"`
* **`elements`**: Always empty array

##### IMAGE (CRITICAL)

* **`image`**: Image object (`url` → REQUIRED for display, `id`, `alt`)
* **`image_size`**: WordPress image size (`thumbnail`, `medium`, `large`, `full`)

##### CONTENT, LINK & LAYOUT

* **`title_text`**: Title of the box
* **`description_text`**: Description text below title
* **`link`**: Makes entire box clickable (`url`, `is_external`, `nofollow`)
* **`link_to`**: Link type (`none`, `custom`)
* **`image_position`**: Position of image (`top` → above text, `left` / `right` → beside text)
* **`align`**: Alignment of content (`left`, `center`, `right`)

##### COLORS, TYPOGRAPHY, SPACING & STYLE

* **`title_color`** / **`description_color`**: Text colors
* **`..._typography_typography`**: Enables typography for title and description
* **`space_between`**: Space between image, title, description
* **`image_border_radius`**: Rounds image corners
* **`hover_animation`**: Animation on hover (e.g., `grow`, `shrink`, `pulse`)

**IMPORTANT NOTES:**
1. `image.url` is REQUIRED for visual output.
2. `title_text` is strongly recommended. `description_text` is optional.
3. `link` wraps entire box. Common use: services, features, cards.

assignments.name: icon-box

#### Icon Box (Widget)

A self-contained block combining an icon, title, and description.

* `elType`: `"widget"`
* `widgetType`: `"icon-box"`
* `elements`: Must be `[]`.
* `settings`:
    * `selected_icon`: An **Icon Object** (e.g., `{ "value": "fas fa-shield-alt", ... }`).
    * `title_text`: The string for the title.
    * `description_text`: The string for the body text.
    * Global settings for alignment, icon size, and typography/colors.

**Example (Icon Box):**

```json
{
  "id": "iconbox123",
  "elType": "widget",
  "widgetType": "icon-box",
  "settings": {
    "selected_icon": {
      "value": "fas fa-star",
      "library": "fa-solid"
    },

    "title_text": "Icon Box Title",

    "description_text": "This is the description for the icon box.",

    "link": {
      "url": "#",
      "is_external": "",
      "nofollow": ""
    },

    "link_to": "custom",

    "position": "top",

    "align": "center",

    "primary_color": "#0073e6",
    "secondary_color": "#ffffff",

    "icon_size": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 40
    },

    "icon_padding": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 15
    },

    "title_color": "#000000",
    "description_color": "#777777",

    "title_typography_typography": "custom",
    "title_typography_font_size": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 20
    },
    "title_typography_font_weight": "600",

    "description_typography_typography": "custom",
    "description_typography_font_size": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 14
    },

    "space_between": {
      "unit": "px",
      "size": 10
    },

    "hover_animation": "grow",

    "margin": {
      "unit": "px",
      "top": 0,
      "right": 0,
      "bottom": 20,
      "left": 0,
      "isLinked": false
    },

    "_animation": "",
    "_animation_delay": 0,

    "css_classes": "",
    "custom_css": ""
  },
  "elements": []
}
```

**Explanation:**

##### TOP LEVEL

* **`id`**: Unique widget identifier
* **`elType`**: Always `"widget"`
* **`widgetType`**: Must be `"icon-box"`
* **`elements`**: Always empty array

##### ICON (CRITICAL)

* **`selected_icon`**
    * Icon object: `value` (Icon class: `"fas fa-star"`, `"fas fa-check"`), `library` (Icon library: `fa-solid`, `fa-regular`, `fa-brands`)
    * *IMPORTANT: REQUIRED for visual output.*

##### CONTENT, LINK & LAYOUT

* **`title_text`**: Title of the box
* **`description_text`**: Description text
* **`link`**: Makes entire box clickable (`url`, `is_external`, `nofollow`)
* **`link_to`**: Link type (`none`, `custom`)
* **`position`**: Position of icon (`top` → above text, `left` / `right` → beside text)
* **`align`**: Alignment of content (`left`, `center`, `right`)

##### COLORS, SIZE, TYPOGRAPHY & SPACING

* **`primary_color`**: Icon color
* **`secondary_color`**: Background color (if styled)
* **`icon_size`**: Size of icon
* **`icon_padding`**: Space around icon
* **`title_color`** / **`description_color`**: Text colors
* **`..._typography_typography`**: Enables typography for title and description
* **`space_between`**: Space between icon, title, description
* **`hover_animation`**: Animation on hover

**IMPORTANT NOTES:**
1. `selected_icon` is REQUIRED.
2. `title_text` is strongly recommended.
3. Same structure as Image Box but with icon instead of image. Common use: feature blocks, service highlights, benefit lists.

assignments.name: container
assignments.value:
### Container

This is the main layout element for sections and wrappers.

  * `elType`: `"container"`
  * `isInner`: `false` for top-level sections. `true` for nested containers (e.g., grid cells).
  * `elements`: An array that holds child element objects (widgets or other containers).
  * `settings`: An object containing styling like `padding`, `margin`, `flex_gap`, `background_background` ("classic" or "gradient"), `background_color`, `background_image` (must be an Image Object), and `background_overlay_background`.

**Example (Container):**

```json
{
  "id": "1f182ab9",
  "elType": "container",
  "isInner": false,
  "settings": {
    "padding": {
      "unit": "px",
      "top": "80",
      "right": "20",
      "bottom": "80",
      "left": "20",
      "isLinked": false
    },
    "background_background": "classic",
    "background_color": "#1A1A1A"
  },
  "elements": []
}
```

-----

assignments.name: grid
assignments.value:
### Grid (Special Container)

This is a **Container** used for multi-column layouts.

  * `elType`: `"container"`
  * `isInner`: `true` (as it's usually inside a main section container).
  * `settings`:
      * `container_type`: **MUST** be `"grid"`.
      * `grid_columns_grid`: Object with `unit: "fr"`, `size` (the number of columns, e.g., 2, 3), and `sizes: []`.
      * `grid_rows_grid`: Object with `unit: "fr"`, `size` (the number of rows, e.g., 1 depend on the rows), and `sizes: []`.
  * `elements`: Its `elements` array **MUST** contain other **Containers** (with `isInner: true`) which act as the grid "cells."

**Example (3-Column Grid):**

```json
{
  "id": "1eaf0c9b",
  "elType": "container",
  "isInner": true,
  "settings": {
    "content_width": "full",
    "container_type": "grid",
    "grid_columns_grid": {
      "unit": "fr",
      "size": 3,
      "sizes": []
    },
    "grid_rows_grid": {
      "unit": "fr",
      "size": 1,
      "sizes": []
    }
  },
  "elements": [
    { "id": "396af374", "elType": "container", "isInner": true, "settings": {}, "elements": [] },
    { "id": "5d484588", "elType": "container", "isInner": true, "settings": {}, "elements": [] },
    { "id": "9a8b7c6d", "elType": "container", "isInner": true, "settings": {}, "elements": [] }
  ]
}
```

### Price List (Widget)

Used for creating a list of items with prices, perfect for menus.

  * `elType`: `"widget"`
  * `widgetType`: `"price-list"`
  * `elements`: Must be `[]`.
  * `settings`:
      * `price_list`: An array of objects. Each object is a list item with `title`, `item_description`, `price`, and an optional `image`.
      * `image` must be an **Image Object**.
      * Global settings control typography and colors for title, price, description, and the separator style.

**Example (Price List):**

```json
          "size": "",
          "source": "url"
        }
      },
      {
        "title": "Item Two",
        "item_description": "Description for the second item on the list.",
        "price": "$9.00",

    ],
```

assignments.name: price-table
assignments.value:
### Price Table (Widget)

A single, comprehensive pricing column or tier. (Use 2-3 in a Grid for a full pricing section).

  * `elType`: `"widget"`
  * `widgetType`: `"price-table"`
  * `elements`: Must be `[]`.
  * `settings`:
      * **Header:** `heading` (e.g., "Pro Plan"), `sub_heading`.
      * **Pricing:** `price`, `currency_symbol`, `period`.
      * **Sale:** `sale: "yes"` and `original_price` (to show a discount).
      * **Features:** `features_list` (an array of items, same as `icon-list`).
      * **Footer:** `button_text` and `footer_additional_info`.
      * **Ribbon:** `ribbon_title` (e.g., "Most Popular").

**Example (Price Table):**

```json
{
  "id": "76a922b2",
  "elType": "widget",
  "isInner": false,
  "widgetType": "price-table",
  "settings": {
```

assignments.value:
### Image Box (Widget)

A self-contained block combining an image, title, and description.

  * `elType`: `"widget"`
  * `widgetType`: `"image-box"`
  * `elements`: Must be `[]`.
  * `settings`:
      * `image`: An **Image Object**.
      * `title_text`: The string for the title.
      * `description_text`: The string for the body text.
      * Global settings for alignment, image size, and typography/colors.

**Example (Image Box):**

```json
{
  "id": "2b41b844",
  "elType": "widget",
  "isInner": false,
  "widgetType": "image-box",
  "settings": {
    "image": {
      "url": "https://picsum.photos/600/400",
      "id": "",
      "size": "",
      "source": "url"
    },
    "title_text": "This is an Image Box",
    "description_text": "A short description of the content goes here.",
    "text_align": "center",
    "title_color": "#111111",
    "description_color": "#555555"
  },
  "elements": []
}
```

assignments.name: icon-box
assignments.value:
### Icon Box (Widget)

A self-contained block combining an icon, title, and description.

  * `elType`: `"widget"`
  * `widgetType`: `"icon-box"`
  * `elements`: Must be `[]`.
  * `settings`:
      * `selected_icon`: An **Icon Object** (e.g., `{ "value": "fas fa-shield-alt", ... }`).
      * `title_text`: The string for the title.
      * `description_text`: The string for the body text.
      * Global settings for alignment, icon size, and typography/colors.

**Example (Icon Box):**

```json
{
  "id": "146272e6",
  "elType": "widget",
  "isInner": false,
  "widgetType": "icon-box",
  "settings": {
    "selected_icon": {
      "value": "fas fa-shield-alt",
      "library": "fa-solid"
    },
    "title_text": "Secure & Reliable",
    "description_text": "A short description of the feature goes here.",
    "text_align": "center",
    "primary_color": "#027BD6",
    "title_color": "#111111",
    "description_color": "#555555"
  },
  "elements": []
}
```
